channel.title: sindresorhus/awesome Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome Sep 27th, 2022
item.description:
Gaming

  • Open Source Gamesstars731

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome Sep 22nd, 2022
item.description:
Health and Social Science

  • Biomedical Information Extractionstars214 - How to extract information from unstructured biomedical data and text.
  • Diversitystars571 - Creating a more inclusive and diverse tech community.
  • Empathy in Engineeringstars485 - Building and promoting more compassionate engineering cultures.
  • Healthcarestars2k - Open source healthcare software for facilities, providers, developers, policy experts, and researchers.
  • Humane Technologystars2.8k - Open source projects that help improve society.
  • Mental Healthstars2.5k - Mental health awareness and self-care in the software industry.
  • Neurosciencestars946 - Study of the nervous system and brain.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Scientific Writingstars451 - Distraction-free scientific writing with Markdown, reStructuredText and Jupyter notebooks.

    • Asynciostars3.6k - Asynchronous I/O in Python 3.

    • CircuitPythonstars488 - A version of Python for microcontrollers.
    • Data Sciencestars1.5k - Data analysis and machine learning.
    • Typingstars1.1k - Optional static typing for Python.
    • MicroPythonstars681 - A lean and efficient implementation of Python 3 for microcontrollers.
  • C/C++stars40.9k - General-purpose language with a bias toward system programming and embedded, resource-constrained software.
  • Javastars33.9k - Popular secure object-oriented language designed for flexibility to "write once, run anywhere".
    • RxJavastars282

    • Composerstars813 - Package manager.
